enonce.texte:
Read the following radio news report about entertainment products and answer the questions.

ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - RADIO REPORT

By Radio Cameroon Entertainment Desk

Good evening, listeners! Welcome to our entertainment segment. Tonight, we have exciting news about the latest entertainment products in Cameroon.

A new film titled "The Journey" has just been released in cinemas across the country. The film tells the story of a young Cameroonian who travels to Europe in search of a better life. Critics say the film is "moving and inspiring."

In music, the famous singer Bella has released her new album "African Rhythms." The album features twelve songs that blend traditional Cameroonian music with modern pop. Fans have already downloaded the album more than 50,000 times on streaming platforms.

For those who love reading, the new book "Cameroon Stories" by author Marie Ndiaye is now available. The book is a collection of short stories about everyday life in Cameroon. It is perfect for people who enjoy reading about their culture.

Finally, the popular video game "African Adventure" has been updated with new levels. Players can now explore 3D versions of famous Cameroonian landmarks like Mount Cameroon and the Lobe Waterfalls.

That's all for today's entertainment news. Stay tuned for more!

questions.texte: What is the title of the new film mentioned in the report?
questions.reponse: The title of the new film is "The Journey."

questions.texte: List two entertainment products mentioned in the report.
questions.reponse: Two entertainment products mentioned are: 1) The film "The Journey," 2) Bella's album "African Rhythms." Other possible answers: the book "Cameroon Stories" or the video game "African Adventure."

questions.texte: Compare the music album and the book mentioned in the report. What do they have in common?
questions.reponse: Both the music album and the book celebrate Cameroonian culture. Bella's album "African Rhythms" blends traditional Cameroonian music with modern pop. The book "Cameroon Stories" is a collection of stories about everyday life in Cameroon. Both products highlight Cameroonian identity and culture.

questions.texte: Evaluate the popularity of Bella's new album. What evidence supports your opinion?
questions.reponse: Bella's new album is very popular. The evidence is that fans have already downloaded the album more than 50,000 times on streaming platforms. This shows that many people are interested in her music and are listening to it.

enonce.texte: Complete the sentences with the correct modal verb or its equivalent expression. Use: can / be able to, may / be allowed to, must / have to.

questions.texte: 1. You ______ (must / have to) buy a ticket if you want to watch the film.
questions.reponse:
Réponse: must / have to

Explication: Les deux formes expriment une obligation. 'Must' est utilisé pour une obligation personnelle, 'have to' pour une obligation externe.

questions.texte: 2. Children ______ (may / are allowed to) enter the cinema for free on Sundays.
questions.reponse:
Réponse: may / are allowed to

Explication: 'May' et 'are allowed to' expriment une permission. 'May' est plus formel.

questions.texte: 3. I ______ (can / am able to) download the album from the internet.
questions.reponse:
Réponse: can / am able to

Explication: 'Can' et 'am able to' expriment une capacité. 'Can' est plus courant à l'oral.

questions.texte: 4. We ______ (must / have to) respect the rules of the game if we want to play.
questions.reponse:
Réponse: must / have to

Explication: Les deux formes expriment une obligation. 'Must' montre que c'est une règle importante.

questions.texte: 5. You ______ (may / are allowed to) borrow my books, but please return them.
questions.reponse:
Réponse: may / are allowed to

Explication: 'May' et 'are allowed to' expriment une permission accordée par le locuteur.

intitule: Exercise 3: Expressing Opinions, Likes, and Dislikes

enonce.texte:
Read the following statements about entertainment products. Write your opinion using the expressions provided.

Useful expressions:

  • Likes: I like / I love / I enjoy / I'm a fan of / I'm interested in
  • Dislikes: I don't like / I hate / I dislike / I'm not a fan of
  • Opinions: In my opinion / I think / I believe / From my point of view

questions.texte:
1. "I think watching films is a great way to relax."
Write your opinion about watching films.
questions.reponse:
Example answers:

  • "I agree. In my opinion, watching films is very entertaining."
  • "I think watching films is fun, but I prefer reading books."
  • "I don't like watching films. I think they are too long."

questions.texte:
2. "Listening to music is the best way to spend free time."
Express your opinion and say if you like it or not.
questions.reponse:
Example answers:

  • "I love listening to music. In my opinion, it helps me relax and feel happy."
  • "I enjoy music, but I think there are other good ways to spend free time."
  • "I don't like listening to music. I prefer playing video games."

questions.texte:
3. "Playing video games is a waste of time."
Do you agree? Give your opinion.
questions.reponse:
Example answers:

  • "I disagree. I think playing video games can be educational and fun."
  • "I partly agree. Playing video games can be a waste of time if you play too much."
  • "I agree. In my opinion, students should focus on studying instead of playing games."

enonce.texte:
Write a dialogue (8-10 exchanges) between two friends who are discussing their entertainment preferences.

Your dialogue should include:

  • A greeting and introduction
  • At least 2 modal verbs or equivalents
  • Expressions of likes and dislikes
  • At least 2 opinions
  • A conclusion

questions.texte: Write a dialogue about entertainment preferences.
questions.reponse:
Example Dialogue:

Jean: "Hi Marie! What do you like to do in your free time?"

Marie: "I love listening to music. I'm a big fan of Bella. She just released a new album called 'African Rhythms.' You must listen to it!"

Jean: "Really? I don't like pop music very much. I prefer watching films."

Marie: "Have you seen 'The Journey'? In my opinion, it's the best film of the year."

Jean: "No, I haven't. You can borrow my book 'Cameroon Stories' if you want. I think you would like it."

Marie: "Thank you! I love reading about Cameroonian culture. But I must finish my homework first."

Jean: "Me too. We have to respect our parents' rules. After homework, we can relax."

Marie: "Great! Let's meet at the library after school."

enonce.texte:
Listen to the following radio report (or read it) and answer the questions.

RADIO ENTERTAINMENT REPORT

"Good morning, listeners! This is your host, Pierre. Today, we're talking about the most popular entertainment products among young people in Cameroon.

Many young people are watching movies on streaming platforms like Netflix and Amazon Prime. Action and comedy films are the most popular. Some people also enjoy watching local films on YouTube and social media.

When it comes to music, Afrobeat and traditional Cameroonian music are very popular. Artists like Bella, Stanley Enow, and Ko-C have millions of followers on social media. Young people often download music using apps like Boomplay and Spotify.

Finally, we asked young people about their favourite games. The most popular games are FIFA, Call of Duty, and the new local game 'African Adventure.' Many teenagers play these games on their phones and computers."

questions.texte: What are the most popular types of films among young Cameroonians?
questions.reponse: The most popular types of films among young Cameroonians are action and comedy films.

questions.texte: Name two music apps mentioned in the report.
questions.reponse: Two music apps mentioned are Boomplay and Spotify.

questions.texte: According to the report, why is 'African Adventure' popular?
questions.reponse: The report does not explicitly say why 'African Adventure' is popular, but it mentions that it's a local game and includes famous Cameroonian landmarks, which likely appeals to young people because it reflects their culture.

enonce.texte:
Write a short review (100-120 words) of an entertainment product you like (film, music, book, video game).

Your review should include:

  • The title of the product
  • What you like or dislike about it
  • Your opinion (using modals)
  • A recommendation

questions.texte: Write a review of an entertainment product.
questions.reponse:
Example Review:

Book Review: 'Cameroon Stories' by Marie Ndiaye

I recently read the book 'Cameroon Stories' by Marie Ndiaye, and I loved it! The book is a collection of short stories about everyday life in Cameroon. In my opinion, the stories are very realistic and emotional.

I particularly enjoyed the story about a family in Douala. It made me appreciate my own family more. The author writes in a simple but powerful way. Everyone must read this book if they want to understand Cameroonian culture.

I highly recommend this book to all students. You can find it in any local bookstore or online. I think you will enjoy it as much as I did!

enonce.texte: Choose the correct modal verb to complete each sentence. Then explain your choice.

questions.texte: You ______ (may / have to) bring your own snacks to the cinema.
questions.reponse:
Réponse: may

Explication: 'May' exprime la permission. Le cinéma permet aux gens d'apporter leurs propres snacks. 'Have to' exprimerait une obligation, ce qui n'est pas le cas.

questions.texte: You ______ (must not / don't have to) speak loudly during the film.
questions.reponse:
Réponse: must not

Explication: 'Must not' exprime une interdiction (il ne faut pas). Parler fort pendant un film est interdit pour ne pas déranger les autres.

questions.texte: We ______ (are allowed to / have to) arrive early to get good seats.
questions.reponse:
Réponse: have to

Explication: 'Have to' exprime une obligation externe. Si on veut de bonnes places, on est obligé d'arriver tôt. 'Are allowed to' exprimerait une permission, ce qui n'est pas le cas ici.

questions.texte: Children ______ (may / must) watch this film because it's educational.
questions.reponse:
Réponse: may

Explication: 'May' exprime la permission. Les enfants sont autorisés à regarder ce film parce qu'il est éducatif. 'Must' exprimerait une obligation.

enonce.texte:
Write a short paragraph (120-150 words) about your entertainment preferences and what you would recommend to a friend.

Your paragraph should include:

  • Your favourite entertainment products
  • Why you like them
  • At least 3 modal verbs or equivalents
  • A recommendation to a friend

questions.texte: Write about your entertainment preferences.
questions.reponse:
Example Paragraph:

My favourite form of entertainment is listening to music. I really enjoy Afrobeat and traditional Cameroonian music. When I feel sad, I can listen to Bella's songs to cheer myself up. Her music makes me feel happy and proud of my culture.

I also love reading books. My favourite book is 'Cameroon Stories.' I think everyone must read this book because it teaches us about our traditions. I have to admit that I am not a fan of video games. I find them too addictive and time-consuming.

If I were to recommend one entertainment product to a friend, I would recommend Bella's album 'African Rhythms.' You may find it on many music apps. I believe you will love it because it has beautiful songs that tell stories about life in Cameroon.
